# MSan suppression file for false positives in C++ standard library
# These occur because the system's libc++/libstdc++ is not MSan-instrumented.
# Suppress known false positive patterns in std::string and std::hash operations.

# std::hash<std::string> reads SSO padding bytes
interceptor_via:std::__1::__string_hash
interceptor_via:std::__cxx11::_Hash_impl

# std::string internal operations
interceptor_via:std::__1::basic_string::__is_long
interceptor_via:std::__1::basic_string::__get_pointer
interceptor_via:std::__1::basic_string::data

# iostream false positives are handled via the compile-time MSan ignorelist
# (tests/common/msan-ignorelist.txt) because the uninstrumented libc++ locale
# state cannot be fully unpoisoned at runtime.
